backgrounds.name: creepy_coffee_shop_interior
backgrounds.prompt: A dimly lit coffee shop interior with Victorian-style decor, flickering candlelight casting long shadows, vintage coffee equipment with an eerie glow, misty atmosphere, slightly tilted perspective creating unease, muted colors with hints of sepia and deep purples, 2D game art style

backgrounds.name: spooky_counter
backgrounds.prompt: An old wooden coffee counter with antique espresso machine, steam rising mysteriously, vintage jars with strange contents, flickering neon sign reflection, dark corners with unclear shapes, hand-painted game art style

backgrounds.name: haunted_seating_area
backgrounds.prompt: Empty cafe seating area with Victorian chairs and tables, moonlight streaming through dusty windows, shadows in the corners, old portraits on walls with eyes that seem to follow, cozy yet unsettling atmosphere, game background art

characters.name: mysterious_barista
characters.prompt: A mysterious barista character with half-shadowed face, Victorian apron with coffee stains, knowing smile, slightly translucent appearance, subtle ghostly aura, character design for game, 2D sprite style

characters.name: ghostly_customer
characters.prompt: A ghostly customer character sitting at cafe table, semi-transparent, vintage clothing from different eras, holding a steaming cup, friendly yet eerie smile, game character design

ui_elements.name: creepy_button
ui_elements.prompt: Game UI button with Victorian frame, aged paper texture, dark wood border, subtle glow effect when hovered, slightly worn appearance, 2D game UI asset

ui_elements.name: mystical_menu_panel
ui_elements.prompt: Game menu panel with ornate Victorian frame, dark purple and gold color scheme, aged parchment center, decorative coffee bean motifs, subtle magical glow, game UI asset

effects.name: steam_particles
effects.description: Coffee steam particle effects, ethereal and slightly magical

effects.name: shadow_movement
effects.description: Subtle shadow movement effects for background ambience
